message:
🐛 Fix EPG matching with call-sign fallback, failover groups, channel focus (#85)

- Add 4th-tier EPG resolution: extract broadcast call signs (WABC, WCBS, WNYW)
- _extractCallSign() parses call signs from parentheses, tvgId, and channel names
- Build epgCallSignToId index from EPG channelIds (WABC.us, abc.ny.newyork.wabc)
- Add failover_groups and failover_group_channels DB tables with CRUD
- Update channel list focus when failover switches streams
- Sort favorites by call sign then name, stripping country/location
- EPG match rate: 33% → 89% for favorites

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
